Row.Text: One random Victory Type (Culture, Diplomatic, or Spaceship) is enabled when any player enters the Atomic Era. All other victories are disabled (note: Time and Domination Victories are always possible).
Enables the Vassalage System, allowing weaker civilizations to become the vassals of stronger civilizations.
Disables Advanced Spy Missions. Spies only provide their passive benefits while stationed in a City. NOTE: This option does nothing if 'No Espionage' is enabled.
